title: Chitter
content:
{{Top|ca|leg|notoc=1}} {{Character |type=Jedi |image= |name=Chitter |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species= |gender= |pronouns= |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes=[[Color/Legends|Black]]''[[Junior Jedi Knights: Lyric's World]]'' |skin=Blue |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=[[New Jedi Order]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|What if we fail?''"
"''Asking the question means that you have already accepted that possibility. Remember, there is no try, only do, for a Jedi. In trying there is success, regardless of the outcome.|Chitter and Luke Skywalker|}} '''Chitter''' was a large, [[Color/Legends|blue]]-skinned, [[Bird/Legends|birdlike]] being with beady black [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] who [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the [[Junior Jedi Academy]], a class of the youngest students at the [[Jedi Praxeum]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]].''[[Junior Jedi Knights: The Golden Globe]]'' Chitter was in the same class at the Praxeum as fellow [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Jedi trainees]] [[Anakin Solo]] and [[Tahiri Veila]]. In [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' within the the academy's [[Grand Audience Chamber]], [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] began a lesson on how to use [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to recapture lost memories. Rather than telling the young students how to perform the technique, Skywalker only told the students to believe and they would succeed. Concerned by this, Chitter asked the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Master what would happen if they failed, to which Skywalker replied that there was no try for a Jedi, only do. The students were then instructed to pair up to practice the exercise. ==Behind the scenes== Chitter appeared in [[Junior Jedi Knights: Lyric's World|''Lyric's World'']], the second book in the ''[[Star Wars: Junior Jedi Knights]]'' series, written by [[Nancy Richardson Fischer|Nancy Richardson]] and released in [[1996]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Junior Jedi Knights: Lyric's World]]'' {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Individuals of unidentified species]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals with unspecified pronouns]] [[Category:Jedi trainees of the New Jedi Order]]
